_readme: Webhook tool config for the Estimator agent. In the ElevenLabs dashboard: Agent > Tools > Add tool > Webhook, then copy these values. Replace {PUBLIC_BASE_URL} with your ngrok URL (no trailing slash).
name: save_profile
description: Save the fields of the student's profile collected so far. Call it after completing each interview section — send only fields the student actually stated. The response lists `still_missing` fields; ask for those next. When `profile_complete` is true, the interview is done.

request_body_schema.description: Any subset of the StudentProfile. Omit fields the student has not provided — never send guesses or empty strings.

level.description: One of: matric, intermediate, a_levels, bachelors, other. FA/FSc/ICS/ICom = intermediate.

test_type.description: One of: ielts_academic, ielts_ukvi, pte_academic, other

test_date.description: ISO date taken or booked, e.g. 2026-05-14

target.description: What and where the student wants to study

preferred_universities.description: Universities the student named, if any

budget.description: Family budget — record amounts exactly as stated

ceiling_per_year.description: Max tuition per year the family can pay, in `currency`

sponsor.description: Who funds the studies, e.g. 'father (textile business owner)'

bank_statement_capacity_pkr.description: Amount the sponsor can show held 28 days, in PKR

notes.description: Anything else the consultancies should know, in the student's words
